title: helichrysum thorbeckei
intro: Helichrysum thorbeckei, also known as the Everlast Plant, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and silvery-green foliage. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene compounds. The medicinal properties of Helichrysum thorbeckei have been associated with various health benefits, including the reduction of inflammation, relief from muscle and joint pain, and improved digestion. The plant can be prepared in various forms, including essential oils, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
